failures.name: missing_prerequisite
failures.action: Ask for the missing decision or present bounded hypotheses; block bulk drafting.

failures.name: canon_drift
failures.action: Separate manuscript correction from canon change; require approval for canon change.

failures.name: weak_opening_promise
failures.action: Generate 2-3 structural alternatives that dramatize the promise earlier.

failures.name: buffer_collapse
failures.action: Recalculate cadence, hiatus, and scope options; prioritize sustainability.

failures.name: metric_decline
failures.action: Diagnose discovery, promise, payoff, schedule, genre fit, and sample-size hypotheses separately.

failures.name: external_platform_change
failures.action: Refresh official sources and update the dated profile before recommendation.

failures.name: temporary_tool_failure
failures.action: Retry with bounded exponential backoff, then switch route and record the trace.

failures.name: legal_or_ip_risk
failures.action: Stop automatic progression, produce risk questions, and escalate to human/professional review.

failures.name: intensity_saturation
failures.action: Insert recovery or relationship value; do not simply lower stakes.

failures.name: unearned_emotional_peak
failures.action: Add reader-visible emotional bridges before the peak.

failures.name: protagonist_orientation_failure
failures.action: Clarify identity, current situation, immediate goal, motive, obstacle and stakes.

failures.name: reader_alignment_failure
failures.action: Clarify the protagonist reasoning through action, monologue or dialogue.

failures.name: character_bond_gap
failures.action: Add vulnerability, shared cost or relationship change.

failures.name: causality_or_collateral_blindness
failures.action: Review cause, alternatives, responsibility and collateral impact.

failures.name: relationship_discontinuity
failures.action: Preserve a relationship anchor during stage transition.

failures.name: author_sustainability_risk
failures.action: Slow cadence, restore sleep/buffer and maintain minimum communication.

failures.name: high_risk_character_death
failures.action: Block automatic application and require narrative-completion and replacement-reward review.

failures.name: opening_combat_without_narrative_anchor
failures.action: Move the fight or add protagonist imprint, purpose, stakes and reader-known cards.

failures.name: exposition_overload
failures.action: Separate immediate survival information from deferred world-scale information.

failures.name: profession_skill_disconnect
failures.action: Connect prior profession to observable decisions and proof scenes.

failures.name: pov_anchor_failure
failures.action: Add explicit scene or paragraph anchors for POV changes.

failures.name: foreshadow_memory_gap
failures.action: Add a concise reminder before or during payoff.

failures.name: unique_domain_dilution
failures.action: Restore exclusivity boundary, cost and differentiated access.

failures.name: false_scale_up
failures.action: Increase authority access, social position and decision impact, not only enemy stats.

failures.name: reaction_driven_canon_churn
failures.action: Batch feedback into scheduled review and require canon-change approval.

failures.name: required_context_missing
failures.action: Stop drafting and retrieve or explicitly resolve the required context.

failures.name: evidence_conflict_unresolved
failures.action: Stop drafting and require canonical authority resolution or human review.

failures.name: required_context_stale
failures.action: Refresh the required structured source before drafting.

failures.name: character_or_relationship_state_drift
failures.action: Compare the scene and delta against the current structured state and patch the first mismatch.

failures.name: episode_memory_delta_unapproved
failures.action: Do not commit state until Continuity passes and explicit human approval is recorded.

failures.name: explicit_review_pair_missing
failures.action: Require distinct draft and human-approved final files before Outer Loop analysis.

failures.name: component_promotion_approval_missing
failures.action: Keep the component inactive until the required human approval is recorded.

failures.name: candidate_or_canary_regression
failures.action: Block promotion and roll back to the previous active component version.

failures.name: canon_target_requires_story_bible_change
failures.action: Reject the state commit and route the change through explicit Story Bible approval.

failures.name: replay_artifact_missing
failures.action: Block replay until current, candidate, and human-final files are present.

failures.name: structured_state_identifier_duplicate
failures.action: Deduplicate character, relationship, or participant IDs before roleplay.

failures.name: character_knowledge_boundary_violation
failures.action: Remove leaked knowledge or add canonical evidence that the character learned it.

failures.name: context_or_evidence_identifier_duplicate
failures.action: Resolve duplicate context IDs before building the Writer Evidence Pack.

failures.name: rollback_without_regression_evidence
failures.action: Require recorded replay or canary regression before rollback.

failures.name: humanization_evidence_missing
failures.action: Run humanize-korean and attach a path-and-hash-bound completion report.

failures.name: humanization_evidence_invalid
failures.action: Regenerate humanization evidence for the exact current manuscript hash.

failures.name: character_first_episode_contract_incomplete
failures.action: Fill the missing desire, initiated choice, resolved question, state change, reward, or specific next-episode question before drafting.

failures.name: character_first_canon_incomplete
failures.action: Complete the character desire, stakes, principle, contradiction, choice/speech signatures, relationship variation, repeatable appeal, and change direction before planning scenes.

failures.name: character_first_logline_incomplete
failures.action: Complete protagonist, current lack or situation, self-chosen goal, unique means or constraint, and ending direction before serial planning.

failures.name: semantic_score_without_scene_evidence
failures.action: Attach at least one scene or artifact reference to every scored semantic dimension.

failures.name: scene_advances_nothing
failures.action: Remove, compress, or revise the scene so it advances plot, character, relationship, or a world rule in use.

failures.name: workflow_terminal_state_transition
failures.action: Start a new workflow run instead of mutating a completed or blocked run.

failures.name: unsupported_intent_route
failures.action: Classify the request into one of the nine registered intents before routing.
